title: Health endpoint (server-probe verified)
goal: Implement a stdlib HTTP server with /health, verified by hitting it.
prompt: Create `app.py` using ONLY the Python standard library (no third-party packages such as Flask). Running `python3 app.py` must start an HTTP server on port 8765 that responds to GET /health with HTTP status 200 and body exactly `ok`. The server should keep running until terminated.
